data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes decision-making time by reducing choices.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined navigation with predictive search features.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes interactive elements for faster accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Large, clickable buttons within reachable area.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Enhances visual perception by organizing elements harmoniously.
data.technical_spec: Consistent layout and spacing to improve focus.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Improves information retention by chunking data.
data.technical_spec: Organized content into short, digestible sections.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items together to enhance user understanding.
data.technical_spec: Proximity cues in design to indicate relatedness.
